channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After a 2-decade ban, kites fill Lahore's skies during a Pakistani springtime festival
item.description: People gathered on rooftops to enjoy flying kites for the first time in years, celebrating the spring festival of Basant. The activity had been banned...

item.title: ChatGPT promised to help her find her soulmate. Then it betrayed her
item.description: ChatGPT sent screenwriter Micky Small down a fantastical rabbit hole. Now, she's finding her way out.

item.title: Dr. Oz pushes AI avatars as a fix for rural health care. Not so fast, critics say
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, who heads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, is advancing a $50 billion plan to modernize rural health care.

item.title: Under oath and unredacted: The top political stories on Epstein this week
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi faced pointed questions on Capitol Hill, and lawmakers continued to press the Justice Department about its decision to reda...

item.title: Rubio reassures trans-Atlantic ties with Europe at Munich Security Conference
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio delivered a calm and reassuring message to America's allies in Munich, after more than a year of President Donald ...

item.title: Watch: 'I am a survivor' GisÃ¨le Pelicot tells BBC Newsnight
item.description: Ms Pelicot reveals it is "inconceivable" that the man she shared her life with "could have committed these horrors".

item.title: 2/13: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: 2 ICE agents on leave over false statements about Minneapolis shooting; Funding for Department of Homeland Security set to lapse.

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: US homeland security shutdown could mean airport delays, travel groups say
item.description: The shutdown won't affect air traffic controllers but some TSA workers may go without pay.

item.title: Police activity under way near Nancy Guthrie's home
item.description: A search has been carried out in Tuscon, Arizona, close to where the 84-year-old was abducted from nearly two weeks ago.

item.title: 'Canadians are with you,' says PM at Tumbler Ridge vigil
item.description: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrieâs home during investigation into her disappearance
Gen Z is logging off and looking for love this Valentine's Day with matchmakers
item.description: Interest in matchmakers is rising as Gen Z disenchantment with dating apps grows, experts say.

item.title: GisÃ¨le Pelicot tells BBC: I felt crushed by horror - but I don't feel anger
item.description: In an extensive interview with Newsnight, the woman at the heart of France's biggest rape trial speaks about betrayal, healing and choosing the right ...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie search activity ramps up near her home in Tucson, Arizona
item.description: The FBI and sheriff's department have been investigating the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, for ...

item.title: 2/13: CBS Evening News
item.description: A new wanted poster was released in the Nancy Guthrie case; children ran from bus stop during an ICE operation

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon pleads not guilty to civil rights charges in Minnesota church protest
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon has pleaded not guilty to federal civil rights charges in Minnesota. The veteran journalist is among several people accused ...

item.title: Feds open a perjury probe into ICE officersâ testimony about the shooting of a Venezuelan man
